query:
SELECT 
                p.id, 
                p.name, 
                p.thumbnail_media_item_id,
                COUNT(DISTINCT va.media_item_id)::INT as "photo_count!"
            FROM person p
            LEFT JOIN face f ON f.person_id = p.id
            LEFT JOIN visual_analysis va ON f.visual_analysis_id = va.id
            WHERE p.id = $1 AND p.user_id = $2
            GROUP BY p.id
